components.name: VCamSample
components.purpose: Windows Media Foundation virtual camera prototype
components.notes: Requires Visual Studio C++ tools, Windows SDK, administrator registration, and a SensorBridge frame-source adapter.

components.name: softcam
components.purpose: Windows 10-compatible DirectShow virtual camera provider for SensorBridge Camera
components.notes: DirectShow Video Input Device filter with sender API and installer example. Requires Visual Studio C++ tools, Windows SDK, administrator registration, and SensorBridge sender integration.

components.name: libusbmuxd
components.purpose: USBMux client and proxy tooling for future USB transport
components.notes: Windows normally also depends on Apple Mobile Device Support or a compatible usbmux service.

components.name: usbmuxd
components.purpose: Reference usbmux daemon source for design comparison
components.notes: Not treated as the default Windows daemon replacement; license and platform limits must be reviewed before redistribution.
